61 E1A E1A_NEG_STATE 21a(E1a)Negative Statements CHAR 1 Indicates the frequency of negative statements the patient expressed. Examples are: "Nothing metters."; "I’d rather be dead."; "What's the use?"; "Let me die." -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space, 0 = Indicator not exhitied in last 30 days, 1 = Indicator of this type exhibited up to five days a week, 2 = Indicator of this type exhibited daily or almost daily (6, 7 days a week)
62 E1B E1B_REPEAT_QUES
